properties.name: Dangote Refinery
properties.description: Africa's largest refinery, 650,000 bpd. Produces petrol, diesel, jet fuel. Commissioned May 2023, PMS production began September 2024.

properties.name: Port Harcourt Refinery
properties.description: Two plants (60k + 150k bpd). Under $1.5B rehabilitation by Tecnimont SpA. Nigeria's largest government-owned refinery.

properties.name: Warri Refinery
properties.description: 125,000 bpd capacity, built 1978. Produces petrol, kerosene, diesel. Currently under rehabilitation.

properties.name: Kaduna Refinery
properties.description: Nigeria's only inland refinery, 110,000 bpd. Serves northern Nigeria. Receives crude via pipeline from Niger Delta.
